top_signals.title: Inflation fears are back in the spotlight as the Middle East conflict keeps oil prices elevated, analysts say
top_signals.summary: Inflation fears are back in focus amid worries over escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran in the Middle East conflict which has kept oil prices elevated
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkish Airlines Exploring Acquisitions in Asia, South America
top_signals.summary: Turkish Airlines is exploring more acquisition opportunities as it looks to expand its global reach.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
